route.name: Around Arrowrock
route.description: Public GPX Boise-area loop with reservoir roads, gravel, climbing, public camps, and a short highway segment.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX Boise-area loop with reservoir roads, gravel, climbing, public camps, and a short highway segment.
route.bestSeason: April to November; July is plausible but needs heat, fire, and smoke checks.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX Boise-area loop with reservoir roads, gravel, climbing, public camps, and a short highway segment.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Rivers, creeks, and Engleman Spring are key sources; filter and verify summer flow.
resources.food: Prairie and Hilltop Station are resupply options with hours that must be confirmed.
resources.camping: Public/formal camps from roughly mile 40-70; Willow Creek is a recommended anchor.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Call Prairie/Hilltop Station before relying on them.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control ride-ready promotion.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

review.decision: reject/rework for ride_ready; Willow Creek/alternate camp proof, Boise NF closure overlay, and resupply hours are unresolved
blockers: Not ride-ready until date-specific camp/permit, water, legal access, closures, fire/smoke, and weather are refreshed.
No official proof for Willow Creek CG availability/status or exact legal dispersed alternative.
Boise NF has multiple active closures and very high fire danger; route-specific overlay not completed.
Resupply hours at Prairie Y-Stop and Hilltop Station are not verified.
Weather/smoke refresh is too early for July 10-13.
requiredFixes: Complete July 9-10 final refresh for next-weekend ride readiness.
Verify Willow Creek CG or exact dispersed camp legality with official Boise NF source/map/order.
Overlay GPX against Boise NF closure map/orders, especially roads near Arrowrock/Middle Fork corridor.
Call/verify Prairie Y-Stop, Hilltop Station, and any campground pump status.
Refresh NWS forecast, Boise NF fire restrictions/active fires, and AirNow/NOAA smoke 24-48h before departure.
openQuestions: Do current closures/fire/weather alter the imported GPX?

promotionChecklist.targetWindowNote: Plausible July overnighter with early starts; heat/fire/smoke and water-adjacent camping are the main gates.
promotionChecklist.officialGeometryNote: Official/public GPX has been imported and parsed locally.
